title: SCP Dystopia Java Edition
description: This is a remake version of SCP: Dystopia Remake Edition on Bedrock version. This mod has 3d Furniture, SCP Facility Building Blocks and Items that come from the original version in the bedrock edition
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cafa08c574ebd2c1f536bb1b5f3f2e975bdebb5.png)

Info : This is a ported version of SCP: Dystopia Remake Edition on Bedrock version. This mod has 3d Furniture, SCP Facility Building Blocks, Items and Entities that come from the original version in the bedrock edition. This mod also adds various features that are not in the bedrock version

# **PLEASE READ THIS IF YOU HAVE A BRAIN : VERSION 1.18.2 REQUIRES GECKOLIB FOR IT TO WORK**

Main Features : 
- Animated blocks (Sliding Doors)
- Some block models can be changed using a wrench
- Animated Entities (SCP's)

Thanks to :
- LuckedCoronet45 (Model, Texture and Concept)
- KaiBoi39 (Model and Texture)
- SCP: Containment Breach (Sounds)

Blocks info : 
> - You can change several block models such as Server Rack, Warehouse Rack, Rack and Pipes using a wrench
> - You can get drinks from SCP-294 by using coins
> - The Sliding Doors model will not work properly with some shaders
> - You can interact with some blocks by right clicking, such as Sink and Lamps

Entities info : 
> - SCP-049 will not attack you if you do not attack it first
> - SCP-173 will not move if you continue to stare at it
> - SCP-096 is still passive (because it is quite difficult to code it) so it will not attack you even if you are in survival mode
> - SCP-280 will only spawn naturally at night

Items info :
> - SCP-458 Pizza will not make you full after eating it
> - You can change some blocks model using a wrench

**DISTRIBUTION RULES**
- If you want to create content using this mod, don't forget to provide credit or a link
- You can modify this mod and share it to public but you have to use the same license and use a (slightly) different title name so there are no misunderstandings (for example: SCP Dystopia <choose whatever name you want>)
- You don't need my permission if you want to make a map using this mod, but you have to include credit or a link

*This mod requires Geckolib to work*
